comment: EXAMPLE Act-1 story gates demonstrating the trigger layer. Coordinates are world pixels near the Onett control spawn (2112,1768). Replace text/coords/flags with real Swagbound story. Flow: walking the road north is blocked until Malady (boss group 448) is cleared at the west gate. Boss-cleared flag is set when the fight starts (bosses block RUN); refine to victory-gated if desired.

dialogue: Something oily peels itself off the air. It is wearing your launch announcement as a face.
MALADY: "You minted hesitation. I mint certainty. Let's settle which one the town remembers."
A slick of pure hype has congealed across the road north. It does not part for vibes alone.
Deal with Malady first. The road only remembers winners.
